nasb.text: He said, “I am a voice of one crying in the wilderness, ‘Make straight the way of the Lord,’ as Isaiah the prophet said.”

esv.text: He said, “I am the voice of one crying out in the wilderness, ‘Make straight the way of the Lord,’ as the prophet Isaiah said.”

cnv.text: 他說：“我就是在曠野呼喊者的聲音：‘修直主的路！’正如以賽亞先知所說的。”

ccb.text: 他说：“我就是在旷野大声呼喊‘修直主的路’的那个人，正如以赛亚先知所言。”

csbs.text: 约翰说：“正如先知以赛亚所说的，我就是在旷野里呼喊的声音：‘你们当修直主的道。’”
